name: metal lined tunnel
description: I'm in a metal lined tunnel
hints: This tunnel has a special force field - it is weakly flickering, unlike the solid deadly ones elsewhere.
A flickering force field is weak enough to pass through safely. This is your route to the lifeboat hangar.
GO FIELD to pass through the flickering force field to reach the lifeboat hangar (room 24). You can also go NORTH toward the engine rooms or SOUTH back to the junction.

needs: which is weakly flickering (must be in room)

notes: Tunnel with a weakly flickering force field - the only safe force field to pass through. Leads to the lifeboat hangar (room 24). North goes to room 25 (toward engine room), south to room 7 (toward junction). Critical passage for reaching the escape route.
